blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots detected that obscure the text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations present on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, folds, or creases on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: No edges of the document are cut off or excluded from the image.

missing_sections.description: All sections of the receipt are present and complete.

obstructions.description: No obstructions such as objects, shadows, or fingers blocking the document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that match the expense schema, including supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, and item description. It is a receipt for an Uber ride, which classifies it as a travel expense.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 5 out of 8 required fields, confirming it as an expense document.

extraction.pickup_location: Calle de Antonio Cumella, 11B, 28030 Madrid, ES
extraction.dropoff_location: P.° de la Castellana, 81, Tetuán, 28046 Madrid, España
extraction.special_notes: La tarifa no incluye los cargos que puede cobrar tu banco.
extraction.terms_conditions: Consulta los términos y condiciones en la página de Uber.

issues.description: Invoice number is not clearly visible or missing
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Document must contain a unique invoice or receipt number for identification

issues.description: VAT amount is not listed clearly
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: VAT amount should be clearly shown on the invoice if applicable

issues.description: Transportation expenses are subject to taxation
issues.recommendation: When employee uses public transport, the amount of the expense must be justified by an invoice or equivalent document. Otherwise, €0.19 per kilometre travelled plus toll and parking costs that are justified
issues.knowledge_base_reference: When employee uses public transport, the amount of the expense must be justified by an invoice or equivalent document. Otherwise, €0.19 per kilometre travelled plus toll and parking costs that are justified

issues.description: Additional documentation is required for mileage claims
issues.recommendation: Employee must report date, starting point, end point, number of km and detail the business purpose. Screenshot/printout of the travel route using GoogleMaps or similar site required. Report must be signed both by employee and employer. Electronic signature is allowed
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Employee must report date, starting point, end point, number of km and detail the business purpose. Screenshot/printout of the travel route using GoogleMaps or similar site required. Report must be signed both by employee and employer. Electronic signature is allowed

issues.description: Receipts and invoices must be submitted with expenses
issues.recommendation: Receipts and invoices must be submitted with expenses. Online copies are sufficient, hard copy not required. Documents must be actual tax receipts or invoices; booking confirmations will not suffice
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipts and invoices must be submitted with expenses. Online copies are sufficient, hard copy not required. Documents must be actual tax receipts or invoices; booking confirmations will not suffice

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has several compliance issues including missing invoice number, unclear VAT amount, and lack of required documentation for mileage claims. Additionally, the transportation expense is subject to taxation. These issues need to be addressed to ensure compliance with GoGlobal's policies and Spanish regulations.
